title: APMSRB Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
organization: Andhra Pradesh Medical Services Recruitment Board (APMSRB)
short_info: Andhra Pradesh Medical Services Recruitment Board (APMSRB) Assistant Professor Notification 2026 has been released on 22 May 2026 on the official website. A total of 8 vacancies have been announced through the APMSRB Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026.

salary_details.details: pay scale of Assistant Professor is Rs.68,900–2,05,500

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for APMSRB Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Assistant Professor posts is scheduled for 02 June 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time with all required documents.

faq.question: Q2. What are the eligibility criteria for the Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The basic eligibility criterion for the Assistant Professor posts is a PG degree with APMC registration. Specific details might be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 8 vacancies for the Assistant Professor posts released by APMSRB.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person with their documents.

faq.question: Q5. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the APMSRB office in Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh. The exact address and timing will be in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry original documents and self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and APMC registration.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the available information, no application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these Assistant Professor positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these Assistant Professor positions is Regular.

faq.question: Q9. Which departments have vacancies for Assistant Professor?
faq.answer: Vacancies are available in Anatomy, Physiology, Pharmacology, Microbiology, Community Medicine, and DVL departments.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 08/2026.
